title: Prime Chamber
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Prime Chamber''' was a room in the [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] [[The Colony|Colony]] on the planet [[Yoggoy]]. It more or less served as a throne room for the leader of the lead hive, that was the [[Prime Unu]] [[Raynar Thul|UnuThul]] of the [[Unu]] nest in [[27 ABY/Legends|27]] to [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]].

There was a circular dais where UnuThul would always be visible to the hundreds of insect attendants that followed wherever he went.

The wall of the Prime Chamber housed the [[Chronicle]], which detailed the transformation of UnuThul and the rise of the Colony.

It was in this chamber that UnuThul confronted the [[Skywalker family/Legends|Skywalker couple]], the [[Solo family/Legends|Solo couple]] and [[Saba Sebatyne]] in 35 ABY when the group came to investigate the disappearance of the [[Myrkr strike team]] survivors. An intense interview on the matter, a debate of the political standing of the [[New Jedi Order]], and a discussion of the [[Potentium]] took place in the room. UnuThul showed the Chronicle to the group, and even attempted to overpower [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] mind with the combined [[The Force/Legends|Force]] power of the Colony, which required Luke, Mara, Leia and Saba join forces to repel him.

The chamber was assumed to be abandoned after the [[Qoribu Truce]]. Whether a similar chamber was constructed on [[Woteba]] or the Unu [[nest ship]] was uncertain.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1st}}
